introSection: Family Roller Coaster is a travelling steel kiddie roller coaster built by Turkish manufacturer Güven Lunapark currently owned and travelled by UK showman James Stokes.
fullText:
Family Roller Coaster is a travelling steel kiddie roller coaster built by Turkish manufacturer Güven Lunapark currently owned and travelled by UK showman James Stokes.

Operated at the Hoppings in 2017.

Yellow track and unpainted supports.
